ns0:entry.ns0:title: EmptyLibra/Configure-Xray-with-VLESS-Reality-on-VPS-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EmptyLibra/Configure-Xray-with-VLESS-Reality-on-VPS-server
Language: html
Подробная инструкция (как в pdf, так и в md формате) о настройке своего совбственного Xray-VPS-сервера (с протоколом VLESS XTLS-Reality через панель 3x-ui), а также настройке клиентских приложений (ПК и телефон)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sushegaad/Claude-Skills-Governance-Risk-and-Compliance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sushegaad/Claude-Skills-Governance-Risk-and-Compliance
Language: html
Claude Skills for Governance, Risk, & Compliance (GRC): Expert-level compliance guidance for ISO 27001, SOC 2, FedRAMP, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, EU AI Act, ISO 42001, ISO 27701, DORA, CSRD, India's DPDPA, CMMC 2.0, NIST AI Risk, SWIFT, Australia's ISM, EU NIS2, and CCPA/CPRA. Benchmark 97% (with skills) vs 81% (without skills).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aishwaryanr/awesome-generative-ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aishwaryanr/awesome-generative-ai-guide
Language: html
A one stop repository for generative AI research updates, interview resources, notebooks and much more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: f/prompts.chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/f/prompts.chat
Language: html
f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: htr-tech/zphisher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/htr-tech/zphisher
Language: html
An automated phishing tool with 30+ templates. This Tool is made for educational purpose only ! Author will not be responsible for any misuse of this toolkit !

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rekryt/iplist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rekryt/iplist
Language: html
IP Address Collection and Management Service with multiple output formats: mikrotik, json, text, ipset, nfset, clashx, keenetic, switchy, amnezia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rezarahiminia/worldcup2026
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rezarahiminia/worldcup2026
Language: html
Grab your football API data for FIFA World Cup 2026 competition!

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tractorjuice/arc-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tractorjuice/arc-kit
Language: html
The Enterprise Architecture Governance Harness — strategy, architecture, delivery, and assurance for AI coding assistants

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trycua/cua
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trycua/cua
Language: html
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
